tracks.meaning: to examine or evaluate something carefully to determine its quality, accuracy, or nature
a medical examination or procedure to diagnose or detect a disease or condition
a standardized assessment tool used to measure abilities, knowledge, personality, or psychological traits
a software program or procedure used to check if code or systems function correctly
an examination or quiz given to students to assess their understanding of material
a trial or legal proceeding to determine guilt or innocence in a court of law
a match or competition between players or teams to determine superior skill
to try out or experiment with something to see if it works or is suitable
to assess or determine the degree, extent, or quality of something
a procedure that runs automated checks on software to verify functionality and identify bugs
